types: from pika.exceptions import AMQPError, AMQPConnectionError, ChannelClosed

primary_operations.name: consume
primary_operations.sdk_call: method, _props, body = self._channel.basic_get(queue=queue_name, auto_ack=False); return body if body is not None else None

primary_operations.name: poll
primary_operations.sdk_call: method, _props, body = self._channel.basic_get(queue=queue_name, auto_ack=False); return body if body is not None else None

code_style_notes: pika.BlockingConnection is NOT thread-safe; one connection per consumer thread
auto_ack=False requires explicit basic_ack(method.delivery_tag) for at-least-once delivery
use queue_declare(durable=True) when consuming from a durable queue created elsewhere
